description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants a shield to [4 (added)] ally with the highest damage dealt, absorbing ATK damage for [7 sec->16 sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Rate increases by [65%->11%] and CC Resistance increases by [600->100].
Deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for [3.5 sec->2sec]. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of [500->800].
For 15 sec, heals 2 allies with the lowest current HP for 1.5% of Max HP 10 times, and increases Magic DEF.

dark.unified: Healed allies take [25%->40%] less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by [10% (added)] for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [10% (added)] for 10 sec.

light.unified: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle.

dark.unified: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by [20% (added)].

description.unified: [Heaven's Vengeance] changes the attack target to a random target and increases Blind duration by {0} sec.
Every 8sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest current HP for {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate by [200->160] and Critical DMG by {1}% of 4 allies with the highest ATK for 8 sec.
